title: Black & White Soccer Ball Birthday Candles (7cm) Pack of 6 - Cake Topper Picks, Festive Party Decorations
features: SOCCER BALL BIRTHDAY CANDLES: Enhance your sports-themed celebrations with these stylish black & white soccer ball candles, perfect for topping birthday cakes or adding a touch of festivity to any soccer lover's party.

BOLD DESIGN & COLORS: Featuring a classic black and white color scheme, these soccer ball candles effortlessly make a striking visual impact and seamlessly blend in with any sports-themed party décor.
OPTIMAL SIZE: Each candle measures 7cm, ensuring they stand out as cake topper picks while still providing adequate space for other decorative elements and won't crowd your cake.
PARTY PACK BUNDLE: Comes in a convenient pack of 6, making it easy to cater to larger parties or events while also providing additional value for the price-conscious shopper.

FESTIVE PARTY DECORATIONS: Not limited to just birthdays, these soccer ball candles serve as versatile and fun decorations for football events, and sports gathering, enhancing the festive atmosphere and leaving a lasting impression on your guests.
